response.overview: Man has always strived to free himself from nature. The history of philosophy is a story of the reflection of this tragic endeavor. With the rapid development of technology, however, we have found ourselves in a new contradiction. Man has never been more liberated from nature, but at the same time, as a species, never more fragile. It seems as if the question of the survival of our civilization has become a matter of intimate decisions and that we are each approaching a potential common catastrophe on our own. The idea of ​​a project was born in which we would discuss the riddles of humanity in private. Not to alleviate feelings of loneliness, but to contribute to the awareness of a community of loners. We invited some exceptional creators, scientists and philosophers who open up thoughts in a way that only good friends can; they awaken the thoughts that sleep within us.
response.title: Zbrani – Zaupno o skupnem
